briefs.prompt: A night-shift security guard at a nearly empty mall finds a child's shoe in the food court after closing and must decide what to do.
Cold email from a freelance data analyst to a clinic operations manager offering to fix their no-show rate dashboard. Specific, not salesy spam.
Personal bio for a 29-year-old backend engineer in Jakarta who left FAANG-style burnout for a logistics startup and still plays badminton on Sundays.
Landing-page paragraph for a tool that turns messy CSV exports into clean monthly finance packs for small shops.
Explain how to debug a flaky Playwright test that fails only in CI when waiting for a toast notification, as if answering a junior engineer.
